Seminar by Oğul Can Öztunç

In the scope of Department of Architecture’s seminar series, we hosted architect Oğul Can Öztunç, Co-Founder of Piknik Works Design Studio, on Friday, November 28, between 13:30 and 15:00, in the Galata Hall.
